mapper.select: SELECT p_id as id, p_name as name, p_order_count as order_count, p_rank as rank FROM product

SELECT p_id as id, p_name as name, p_order_count as order_count, p_rank as rank FROM product, (SELECT cg_id as id FROM category WHERE cg_id LIKE CONCAT(#{id}, '%')) ta1 where ta1.id = product.p_category
SELECT p_id as id, p_name as name, p_order_count as order_count, p_rank as rank FROM product

SELECT product.p_id as id, p_name as name, p_price as price, p_order_count as order_count, p_views as views, p_category as category, p_quantity as quantity, pi_image as image, p_text as text FROM product JOIN product_img ON (product.p_id = product_img.p_id);

SELECT product.p_id as id, p_name as name, p_price as price, p_order_count as order_count, p_views as views, p_category as category, p_quantity as quantity, pi_image as image, p_text as text FROM product JOIN product_img ON (product.p_id = product_img.p_id) WHERE product.p_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product ( p_id, p_name, p_price, p_category, p_quantity, p_order_count, p_views, p_text ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{price}, #{category}, #{quantity}, 0, 0, #{text} )
mapper.update:
update product set p_id = #{id}, p_name = #{name}, p_price = #{price}, p_category = #{category}, p_quantity = #{quantity}, p_text = #{text}
where p_id= #{id}
